name: io.github.elliotpadfield/hatchet-mcp
description: Observe and operate Hatchet workflows from an AI agent: status, runs, logs, workers, metrics, plus trigger / cancel / replay.

environment_variables.name: HATCHET_CLIENT_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Hatchet API token (a JWT). Encodes the server URL and tenant, so it is normally the only setting required.

environment_variables.name: HATCHET_API_BASE
environment_variables.description: Override the API base URL. Self-hosters can point this at any Hatchet instance.

environment_variables.name: HATCHET_TENANT_ID
environment_variables.description: Override the tenant id decoded from the token.
